name: The Lottery Corporation Limited
analysis: TLC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 5% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.5950, stop A$5.1678, target A$6.8766 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
